'''vazungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wthr|wthr]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wthr|wthr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vazungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væzingith|væzingith]] || [[word:væzingij|væzingij]] || [[word:væzingish|væzingish]] || [[word:væzingi|væzingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazuzunguth|vazuzunguth]] || [[word:vazuzunguj|vazuzunguj]] || [[word:vazuzungush|vazuzungush]] || [[word:vazuzungu|vazuzungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazunguth|vazunguth]] || [[word:vazunguj|vazunguj]] || [[word:vazungush|vazungush]] || [[word:vazungu|vazungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazufnguth|vazufnguth]] || [[word:vazufnguj|vazufnguj]] || [[word:vazufngush|vazufngush]] || [[word:vazufnguf|vazufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vazunguthu|vazunguthu]] || [[word:vazunguju|vazunguju]] || [[word:vazungushu|vazungushu]] || [[word:vazunguku|vazunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vazunguth|vazunguth]] || [[word:vazunguj|vazunguj]] || [[word:vazungush|vazungush]] || [[word:vazungu|vazungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vazunguthul|vazunguthul]] || [[word:vazungujul|vazungujul]] || [[word:vazungushul|vazungushul]] || [[word:vazungukul|vazungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vazunguthuthu|vazunguthuthu]] || [[word:vazungujuju|vazungujuju]] || [[word:vazungushushu|vazungushushu]] || [[word:vazunguku|vazunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vazunguthun|vazunguthun]] || [[word:vazungujun|vazungujun]] || [[word:vazungushun|vazungushun]] || [[word:vazungukun|vazungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vazunguthuoro|vazunguthuoro]] || [[word:vazungujuoro|vazungujuoro]] || [[word:vazungushuoro|vazungushuoro]] || [[word:vazungukuoro|vazungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
